LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF TENDER LOVING THINGS, INC'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF ORDER DENYING MOTION FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE CONTEMPT IS DENIED. THIS COURT WILL NEITHER GUESS AT NOR REVIEW JUDGE WARREN'S REASONS FOR DENYING OSC IN 2004. THIS RULING DOES NOT ADDRESS THE MERITS OF THE ORIGINAL MOTION OR OF ANY OTHER MOTION THAT MIGHT BE BROUGHT. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideraiton Of Order Denying Motion For Order To Show Cause Re Contempt
Off Calendar Jul-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF TENDER LOVING THINGS, INC'S Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Denying Motion For Order To Show Cause Re Contempt is denied. This Court will neither guess at nor review Judge Warren's reasons for denying OSC in 2004. This ruling does not address the merits of the original motion or of any other motion that might be brought. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/xAS) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
